step_by_step_reasoning: Based on the transcript, the architecture is an event-driven MLOps pipeline running on AWS. The process begins with a Data Scientist initiating a campaign through a portal. 1. The request goes to an MSK Kafka topic. 2. An Orchestrator Fargate task (ECS) consumes this to create an execution plan, writing messages to another MSK topic. 3. An Operational Consumer Fargate task (ECS) processes this, launching preprocessing on EMR or batch transformation on SageMaker, and logging status to OpenSearch. 4. EventBridge monitors EMR/SageMaker status changes, triggering an EventBridge Consumer Fargate task (ECS) that writes back to MSK to handle sequential steps. 5. A Notifier Fargate task (ECS) detects the end of execution, logging final state to OpenSearch and notifying the Portal user.

graph.name: Experian Event-Driven MLOps Batch Transform Pipeline
graph.notes: An event-driven machine learning platform executing tens of billions of model operations monthly. It leverages Amazon MSK as the backbone, orchestrating workloads across EMR and SageMaker using ECS Fargate tasks.

nodes.name: Data Scientist / Portal
nodes.notes: Initiates campaigns and views real-time execution status.

nodes.name: Orchestration Kafka Topic
nodes.notes: Ingests initial batch transform execution triggers.

nodes.name: Orchestrator Consumer
nodes.notes: Fargate-based task that determines the execution plan for the campaign.

nodes.name: Execution Kafka Topic
nodes.notes: Coordinates operational workflow stages and step transitions.

nodes.name: Operational Consumer
nodes.notes: Fargate task triggering EMR preprocessing or SageMaker model jobs.

nodes.name: EMR Cluster
nodes.notes: Performs data ingestion and pre-processing on multi-format datasets.

nodes.name: SageMaker
nodes.notes: Executes testing, training, and production batch transform jobs.

nodes.name: OpenSearch Service
nodes.notes: Metadata store tracking current campaign and job statuses.

nodes.name: Amazon EventBridge
nodes.notes: Captures EMR and SageMaker state-change events.

nodes.name: EventBridge Consumer
nodes.notes: Fargate task translating EventBridge triggers into sequential Kafka messages.

nodes.name: Notifier Consumer
nodes.notes: Fargate task identifying batch completion and updating final status.

edges.notes: Notifies Portal and user of workflow termination.
